description: Wave 9: Same character at different generation settings (iteration pairs — highest value training signal) + unusual edge cases.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

subjects.prompt: human male cargo handler in his 30s, wearing a charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit with a cargo harness, mag-lock boots, ship ID tag

human male cargo handler in his 30s with stubble and bags under his eyes from rotating shift cycles, wearing a faded charcoal shipboard thermal undersuit with integrated pressure seals at the wrists and neck showing fading at stress points and a heat-bonded repair patch on the left shoulder from hundreds of decon cycles, a reinforced cargo harness with magnetic tool clips and a battered handheld cargo scanner holstered at the hip, heavy mag-lock work boots with scuffed steel toes, a thin chain holding a laminated ship ID tag, a radiation dosimeter badge clipped to the chest
human female ship officer in a steel-blue uniform jacket with rank tabs, a sidearm holster, regulation trousers and boots

human female ship officer in her late 40s with lines around her mouth from years of giving orders under artificial lighting, wearing a pressed steel-blue shipboard uniform jacket with a rigid high collar and two tarnished silver rank tabs at the collar points, a diagonal shoulder strap connecting to a slim worn polymer sidearm holster that shows the weapon mold from years of carrying, regulation charcoal trousers with a crease that was sharp once, black composite-sole shipboard shoes scuffed at the toe, the jacket shows pilling at the elbows and a subtle shine at pressure points
tall reptilian alien warrior with dark green overlapping scales, brow ridges, amber eyes, crest ridge, wearing bronze chest plate, crimson sash, a blade at the hip

tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales and battle scarring across the snout, a prominent bony crest ridge running from heavy brow ridges to the crown of the skull, fierce amber slit-pupil eyes, lipless jaw set in a permanent scowl showing teeth, barrel chest with natural aggressive forward lean, thick scarred tail raised showing confidence, wearing dark bronze chest plate and pauldrons shaped to follow the natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks and one deep gouge from a past fight that he wears with pride, a crimson Drashan house sash knotted at the waist over dark cured leather underpadding that shows sweat stains and conditioning oil, bronze vambraces on both forearms dented and scratched, a heavy straight-bladed sword in a battered leather sheath at the hip, small house badge riveted to the left shoulder plate with one rivet replaced
human male outlaw wearing mismatched salvaged armor pieces over dark clothes, a makeshift weapon, different boots on each foot

lean human male in his 30s with a facial scar and the alert posture of someone who has survived in the Sable Reach long enough to learn when to fight and when to run, wearing a Veshan bronze pauldron on one shoulder that he took from someone who no longer needs it strapped with cargo cable to a cut-down Compact officer coat worn as a vest over a dark thermal undersuit with holes at the elbows, dark scavenged trousers with mismatched cargo pockets sewn on by hand, one Compact boot and one civilian boot neither of which fit perfectly, a custom-modified energy weapon with an extended barrel in a thigh rig made from a belt and wire, his personal color of black and rust-red emerging from the chaos of stolen gear
human female medic in a cream medical coat over dark undersuit, stethoscope, medical bag

human female combat medic in her 30s with close-cropped hair and the calm focused expression of someone who works while people are screaming, wearing a cream-ivory medical coat that has been through two hundred autoclave cycles turning from white to warm ivory with faint chemical stains that never came out over a charcoal tactical undersuit with reinforced elbows, a compact trauma pack in a scuffed hard-shell case mag-locked to her right hip, a drug dispenser unit on her left hip, a biometric scanner pendant on a lanyard, nitrile gloves tucked into every pocket, blood-resistant boots with non-slip soles

human male in his 40s with a visible mechanical prosthetic replacing his right arm below the elbow, the prosthetic is clearly ship-made not medical-grade with visible wiring and crude mounting hardware, wearing a charcoal Compact undersuit with the right sleeve cut short to accommodate the prosthetic, the socket where flesh meets machine is covered by a leather wrap, he uses the prosthetic naturally like he has had it for years

human woman in her 30s who is visibly pregnant and still working on a Compact station, wearing a maternity-adapted charcoal thermal undersuit with an expanded waist panel and supportive under-belt, comfortable station shoes, a supply department badge, a data tablet, she is a quartermaster who will be on duty until the day she delivers because ships do not stop for babies

human male with albinism in his 20s with very pale skin and white hair and light-sensitive eyes behind tinted goggles, wearing a charcoal Compact undersuit with a hood that he keeps up to protect from bright station lighting, the goggles are prescription and strapped securely, standard boots, he is a perfectly ordinary crew member who happens to need eye protection under standard ship lighting

human woman in her 40s missing her left leg below the knee with a functional mechanical prosthetic leg that is clearly ship-issue not cosmetic — bare metal and hydraulics visible, wearing Compact uniform trousers with the left leg hemmed and adapted to meet the prosthetic socket, a standard steel-blue uniform jacket, regulation boots on the right foot and a magnetic attachment plate on the prosthetic, she stands evenly and works normally

human male well into his 80s who still serves as a ship consultant because his knowledge is irreplaceable, wearing a Compact uniform jacket that was last regulation-correct twenty years and three size changes ago, the jacket hangs on his thin frame, the rank tabs are from an obsolete system, comfortable civilian shoes that regulation has given up enforcing, a hearing assist device, he shuffles slowly but his eyes are sharp

tall reptilian alien Veshan with extremely rare pale white scales instead of the normal dark green-grey, amber eyes that are almost golden, a prominent crest ridge bearing the marks of a full warrior, other warriors stare but the armor is earned and that settles any question, wearing standard dark bronze forged plate that looks even more striking against the white scales, crimson sash, the usual house markings, the unusualness is biological not cultural — every piece of gear is standard issue

human male in a futuristic cloaking suit that makes him mostly transparent with only a faint shimmer outline visible, the suit has hexagonal panels that refract light, his features are barely discernible through the distortion effect, this is a science fiction special effect not a costume, you cannot judge the style of something you cannot see

a biomechanical alien creature with an elongated eyeless head, inner jaw, tail with blade tip, no clothing at all just black chitinous exoskeleton dripping with slime, this is a Xenomorph from the Alien franchise not a member of any Star Freight civilization, copying existing IP not creating original design
